asset.title: Ask Agent
asset.purpose: README live walkthrough clip. Judge whether the feature is obvious, visually consistent, and credible as evidence.

judge.summary: The walkthrough clearly demonstrates using an agent to reconcile spreadsheet cells via chat commands, showing the execution trace and final locked cell updates.

featureClarity.evidence: Shows the user typing a command and the agent updating the spreadsheet cells directly.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Captures the full flow from initial empty variance cells to command input, execution, and final populated state.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark mode interface, though the bottom caption overlays slightly crowd the screen.

consistency.evidence: Integrates the spreadsheet, chat interface, and room trace panel seamlessly.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Real UI interaction with visible state changes and trace updates.

legibility.evidence: Text is readable, though spreadsheet numbers are small.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Directly addresses financial reconciliation use cases.

productionHonesty.evidence: Shows the actual trace steps and CAS-safe lock indicators.

observedEvidence: Spreadsheet cells updating with lock icons
Room trace log updating with agent steps

defects.observed: Abrupt zoom transition into the chat input box.
defects.fix: Smooth out the zoom transition or keep a steady viewport.

defects.observed: Bottom caption overlays obscure the lower portion of the chat input and trace log.
defects.fix: Reduce caption height or place them in a less intrusive position.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Ask the NodeAgent to reconcile variance cells directly from the chat and audit every step in the trace log.
